RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Dec-14-2005 Set For Trial On Dec-14-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 210

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2005 Continued To Dec-14-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar this day for Small Claim Appeal. The Judge Pro Tem Robert J. Stumpf, Jr. Presiding. Clerk of Court: Don Feinberg. Proceedings are not reported. Counsel for Mr. Chan refused to stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Stumpf presiding. Cause was transferred to Dept. 206 forthwith for re-assignment and was subsequently assigned to Dept. 210.

At 11:10 Respondent Brahim Fliga presented himself in Dept. 525 and was directed to appear immediately in Dept. 210, but Dept. 210 had already sent Appellant Raymon On Bong Chan away, for re-setting the trial to a future date. Accordingly, the Small Claim Appeal is continued to January 4, 2006 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 525. Notices sent by the court.
